claim: Conte, R. and Musette, M. 'The Painlevé Handbook', Mathematical Physics Studies, Springer (2008), 1st edition; ISBN 978-1-4020-8491-1; book DOI 10.1007/978-1-4020-8491-1; chapter 7 DOI 10.1007/978-1-4020-8491-1_7; cited in early SIARC framing as primary anchor for Painlevé-class structural framing of P_III(D_6); a 2nd edition exists (2020, DOI 10.1007/978-3-030-53340-3) where ch. 7 is titled 'Discrete nonlinear equations'.
script: Phase A bibliographic confirmation; cross-checked via Google Scholar lookup of book DOI and 2020 2nd-edition ch. 7 title (Conte & Musette, 'Discrete nonlinear equations', The Painlevé Handbook 2020, Springer)

claim: Phase B.1 + B.5 (SpringerLink chapter DOI 10.1007/978-1-4020-8491-1_7 and book page link.springer.com/book/10.1007/978-1-4020-8491-1) BOTH HTTP-redirect to https://idp.springer.com/authorize?response_type=cookie&client_id=springerlink&... SpringerLink full text is behind institutional/IdP authentication; per Rule 1 the agent does NOT auto-authenticate; route classified PAYWALL_RULE_1.
script: fetch_webpage probe of https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-1-4020-8491-1_7 and https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/978-1-4020-8491-1; Phase B.1 + B.5

claim: Phase B.3 (arXiv full-text search, query 'Conte Musette Painleve handbook'): zero results. Author-name listing for 'Conte R' returns 346 papers across all R. Conte (mostly distinct researchers); no entry matches a 2007-2008 Painlevé-Handbook ch. 7 preprint by Robert Conte and Micheline Musette. Book chapter was not deposited to arXiv.
script: fetch_webpage of https://arxiv.org/search/?searchtype=all&query=Conte+Musette+Painleve+handbook (returned 'no results') and https://arxiv.org/search/?searchtype=author&query=Conte+R (no Painlevé Handbook ch. 7 preprint in first 50 of 346 results); Phase B.3

claim: Phase B.4 (Internet Archive search 'Painleve Handbook Conte'): zero metadata results. Phase B.7 (Google Scholar lookup): only paywalled SpringerLink URLs surfaced for the 2008 1st-edition Painlevé Handbook chapters (ch. 5 and ch. 7 both at link.springer.com); no OA mirror found. WorldCat (B.6) responded HTTP 403 to anonymous fetch.
script: fetch_webpage of https://archive.org/search?query=%22Painleve+Handbook%22+Conte (0 results); https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Painlev%C3%A9+Handbook%22+Conte+Musette+2008+chapter+7 (paywalled SpringerLink hits only); https://www.worldcat.org/title/painleve-handbook/oclc/233937481 (HTTP 403); Phases B.4-B.7

claim: Verdict: no OA route to Conte-Musette 2008 ch. 7 succeeded across Phases B.1-B.7; the only programmatically-reachable route (SpringerLink) hit auth-redirect (Rule 1); arXiv carries no preprint; Internet Archive carries no copy; Google Scholar surfaces only the paywalled SpringerLink URLs; G3b residual (iii) (Conte-Musette ch. 7 NIA) stays closed-via-substitute by slot 06 Costin 2008 ch. 5 (SHA prefix 436c6c11; SCENARIO_C disposition retained); ILL via Yokohama City Library or University of Tokyo library recommended for any future primary-source upgrade; M6 spec Phase C.3 retains slot 06 Costin ch. 5 as primary anchor; cross-validation against Costin 2008 ch. 5 NOT performed (acquisition negative; Phase D.1 conditional path not entered).
script: Phase D verdict synthesis from Phase A + Phase B.1-B.7 findings; no Phase C acquisition occurred; SCENARIO_C disposition unchanged.
